summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Aashwashan mental health website with new Supabase auth, Admin Panel, and Community features. All 35 backend tests passed (22 new auth tests + 13 existing feature tests). All frontend flows verified working correctly.

admin_login.details: Admin login at /admin/login works with admin@aashwashan.com / Admin123! - redirects to dashboard

admin_dashboard.details: Dashboard shows stats (Total Users, Therapists, Appointments, Blog Posts), sidebar navigation works

admin_blog_management.details: Manage Blogs tab shows blog list with edit/delete actions, New Blog button present

admin_user_management.details: Users tab shows user list with roles (admin, user) and status

user_auth_page.details: User auth at /auth allows registration and login with Sign In/Sign Up tabs

community_unauthenticated.details: Community page shows 'Sign In / Sign Up' button for unauthenticated users, post form hidden

community_authenticated.details: Authenticated users can create posts with title, content, category, and anonymous option

api_auth_register.details: /api/auth/register creates new users and returns JWT token

api_auth_login.details: /api/auth/login authenticates users and returns JWT token

api_auth_me.details: /api/auth/me returns current user info with valid token

api_admin_blogs.details: /api/admin/blogs CRUD operations work correctly (requires admin auth)

teal_theme.details: Teal/cyan gradient theme consistent across all pages

session_pricing.details: Session pricing visible: 30 min ₹999, 45 min ₹1400, 60 min ₹1600

no_coupon_ui.details: No coupon code UI anywhere on the site

footer_logo.details: Footer logo displays correctly using emergentagent.com source

test_credentials.test_users: Created during testing with random emails

seed_data_creation: Test blogs and community posts created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Supabase auth features working: 1) Admin login/dashboard/blog management 2) User registration/login 3) Community posts require auth 4) All previous UI fixes (teal theme, no coupon, footer logo, session pricing) remain intact. Database: PostgreSQL via Supabase + MongoDB for legacy endpoints.

mocked_apis_list: Razorpay payment integration (returns mock orders/verification for testing)
